Container.Name: NaviClean
Container.Overview: NaviClean scans a mounted Navidrome music library, previews Lidarr-style artist/album/track organization, and detects duplicate tracks across filenames and extensions.
Container.Description: NaviClean provides a web UI for cleaning Navidrome libraries before or alongside Lidarr import. It stores settings under /data, reads and writes the mounted /music library, defaults to admin/admin authentication, can disable built-in auth for reverse-proxy systems such as authentik, tests Navidrome via the Subsonic-compatible API, previews all planned moves before applying them, and moves duplicate removals into a recycle bin folder by default.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Container 8080 - Host port for the NaviClean web UI

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: Stores NaviClean settings, auth configuration, and the latest scan catalog

Config.Name: Navidrome Music Library
Config.Description: Host music folder that Navidrome scans. NaviClean needs read/write access to preview organization, move files, and place duplicate removals in /music/.naviclean-trash by default.

Config.Name: Secure Cookies
Config.Description: Set true when NaviClean is accessed over HTTPS. Leave false for direct HTTP/LAN testing.
